answer:
<think> Jimmy Eat World is an American rock band. They have collaborated with Mark Trombino on several of their albums. The albums "Clarity" (1999) and "Bleed American" (2001) were produced by Trombino. However, "Bleed American" was released before September 11, 2001. The only other Jimmy Eat World album produced by Trombino and released after that date is "Chase This Light" (2007). </think>
<answer> \boxed{Chase This Light}
